title: Model 8-X Unirail
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Model8-XUnirail.jpg|thumb|250px|Model 8-X unirail]]
The '''Model 8-X Unirail''' was manufactured by [[Kuat Drive Yards/Legends|Kuat Drive Yards]]. If equipped with the standard fifteen cars, the train measured 320 meters long, carried ninety passengers per car, and held one metric ton of cargo.

{{Veh-stub}}
